meta.title: DXBiz - Digital transformation for Vietnamese businesses
meta.description: DXBiz consults and delivers tailored digital transformation solutions for businesses — streamline operations, boost efficiency and partner for the long term.

hero.title: Tailored digital transformation solutions for your business
hero.subtitle: DXBiz partners with you from consulting and design to implementation — built around your real workflows, instead of forcing your business to adapt to off-the-shelf software.
hero.imgAlt: DXBiz solution dashboard showing business operations metrics

products.title: The building blocks behind your solution
products.subtitle: Every DXBiz solution is built on proven platforms and tailored to your business — so you never start from scratch.

items.name: DXFlow
items.description: An AI assistant that automates processes and connects with the many tools your business already uses, not just DXBiz's own products.

items.name: OrderHub
items.description: Manage orders and omnichannel sales in one place, with inventory and shipping synced in real time.

items.name: PageHub
items.description: Build and manage professional landing and sales pages — no technical team required.

items.name: SEOHub
items.description: Track and optimize search rankings to grow organic traffic to your business website.

features.title: Not off-the-shelf software — a solution for your business
features.subtitle: DXBiz consults around your real problems, implements fast and stays with you for the long run — instead of leaving you to figure out software alone.

items.title: Tailored solutions
items.description: We map your real workflows and design a fitting solution, rather than forcing your business into a fixed template.

items.title: Fast, low-risk rollout
items.description: Go live in phases, measured and adjusted along the way — minimizing disruption for your team.

items.title: Long-term partnership
items.description: A dedicated team supports you throughout, continuously optimizing as your business grows.

solutions.title: A dedicated solution for every business model
solutions.subtitle: Each industry has its own operational challenges — DXBiz designs solutions around your specific processes and needs.
solutions.spaDesc: Automate booking, reminders and returning-customer care, synced across all branches.
solutions.spaImgAlt: Spa staff using the DXBiz solution at the reception desk

items.title: Retail & Chains
items.description: Inventory management, multi-branch sync, stock forecasting and GHN/AhaMove shipping integration.

items.title: Services & Agencies
items.description: Centralized project management, automated reporting and efficient staff allocation.

partners.label: Integrated with Vietnam's leading business platforms

testimonials.title: Trusted by businesses to run every day
testimonials.subtitle: Many businesses have streamlined operations and grown with DXBiz solutions.

items.quote: DXBiz mapped our chain's real workflows and rolled out smoothly. Reminders and returning-customer care now run themselves, and our return rate has clearly increased.
Real-time inventory sync between Sapo and our actual warehouse ended our overselling problems. End-of-day reports run themselves — no more manual data entry.
The DXBiz team stayed close during rollout and beyond. Our processes were digitized step by step, taking load off the team without any disruption.

cta.title: Ready to streamline your operations?
cta.subtitle: Book a 1-on-1 consultation with DXBiz — we'll analyze your challenges and propose the right solution.
cta.note: Free consultation & process review · We respond within 24 business hours

contact.subtitle: Leave your details and we'll reach out for a free consultation and process review within 24 business hours.
